aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars are unclear. Your staging environment is also unclear.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are whispering something to you today. You keep asking them to file a ticket.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — The universe demands stillness. Your CI pipeline has also demanded stillness for 40 minutes.
taurus.prophecy: Today asks you to pause and reflect. Your to-do list did not pause. Your to-do list never pauses.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: No — Unknown cosmic forces are at work. Your codebase has unknown forces too. Several of them.
gemini.prophecy: Clarity will come to you today. Probably after standup where you describe the same blocker for the third time in a row.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars offer no guarantees. Your QA team also offers no guarantees.
cancer.prophecy: The universe is silent today. Your Slack is not. Your Slack will never be silent.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: No — The cosmos ask for patience. Your users have requested a hotfix. These are conflicting instructions.
leo.prophecy: Big energy is building beneath the surface. So is your technical debt. They will both surface on the same day.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — The absence of cosmic interference is itself a sign. Nothing is on fire yet. Roll the dice.
virgo.prophecy: The stars have nothing to say to you today. This is the most peace you will have all week. Cherish it.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — Balance is the theme today. Half your tests are passing. Half your tests are not.
libra.prophecy: The cosmic scales are perfectly balanced today. Your PR has exactly as many approvals as it has change requests.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Something lurks in the darkness. Also in your logs. Especially in your logs.
scorpio.prophecy: Deep truths will surface today. One of them is that you have not written a single unit test for this module.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Adventure awaits the bold. Your feature branch has been sitting untouched for two weeks. Ship it.
sagittarius.prophecy: The horizon looks promising. You will spend most of the day staring at your terminal instead.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — Foundations must be solid before you climb. You have three TODO comments marked FIXME. Sort that out first.
capricorn.prophecy: Hard work compounds quietly over time. So does your unread notification count. Currently at 847.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Innovation requires uncertainty. Your architecture diagram also contains a lot of uncertainty. Many question marks.
aquarius.prophecy: You are ahead of your time. Your dependencies are not. Three of them are end-of-life.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — Dreams need time to take shape. Your feature spec also needs more time to take shape. Significantly more time.
pisces.prophecy: The current carries you forward without effort today. Your deployment pipeline has been running for 52 minutes. It is not moving without effort.
